item.description:

ℹ️:

  • INTERACTIVE APP – The free LEGO DUPLO Interactive Trains app lets kids record their own sounds and drive the train toy using a portable electronic device
  • GREAT FOR MONTESSORI – LEGO DUPLO build-and-rebuild train toys are designed to develop toddlers’ patience, focus, perseverance and creative problem-solving skills
  • TODDLER LEARNING TOYS – With this building set, preschoolers use problem-solving skills to pack items and build toy train tracks to the station, park, or beach
  • WHATS IN THE BOX? – Includes 4 DUPLO figures, a toy train that plays lights and sounds, 3 destination builds and 14 LEGO train track pieces
  • GIFT FOR TODDLERS – This LEGO DUPLO construction toy makes a fun gift for 2+ year old boys and girls who like train sets and fun interactive toys
  • 5 INTERACTIVE DUPLO BRICKS – Great for use as a Montessori toy, the train set sparks kids imaginations with lights and sounds; requires 4x AAA batteries (1.5V or 1.2V rechargeable, not included)
  • INTERACTIVE TRAIN SET – Toddlers embark on a stimulating learning journey with the LEGO DUPLO Interactive Adventure Train toy for 2+ year old boys and girls

  • Fun accessories – The Mandalorian minifigure has a darksaber and jetpack, Grogu has a hover pram, and the set also includes a fuel station to build
  • Build creativity – LEGO Star Wars sets for ages 4+ introduce young kids to more complex builds and the Star Wars universe, helping them develop their imaginations
  • Mando and Grogu’s N-1 Starfighter – Kids aged 4+ learn to build with LEGO bricks and create stories in the Star Wars: The Mandalorian universe
